title: HauntAttack: When Attack Follows Reasoning as a Shadow
abstract: arXiv:2506.07031v5 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Emerging Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) consistently excel in mathematical and reasoning tasks, showcasing remarkable capabilities. However, the enhancement of reasoning abilities and the exposure of internal reasoning processes introduce new safety vulnerabilities. A critical question arises: when reasoning becomes intertwined with harmfulness, will LRMs become more vulnerable to jailbreaks in reasoning mode? To investigate this, we introduce HauntAttack, a novel and general-purpose black-box adversarial attack framework that systematically embeds harmful instructions into reasoning questions. Specifically, we modify key reasoning conditions in existing questions with harmful instructions, thereby constructing a reasoning pathway that guides the model step by step toward unsafe outputs. We evaluate HauntAttack on 11 LRMs and observe an average attack success rate of over 70\%, achieving up to 13 percentage points of absolute im

Abstract: arXiv:2506.07031v5 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Emerging Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) consistently excel in mathematical and reasoning tasks, showcasing remarkable capabilities. However, the enhancement of reasoning abilities and the exposure of internal reasoning processes introduce new safety vulnerabilities. To investigate this, we introduce HauntAttack, a novel and general-purpose black-box adversarial attack framework that systematically embeds harmful instructions into reasoning questions. translated_title: HauntAttack：当攻击如影随形地跟随推理过程
translated_abstract: arXiv:2506.07031v5 公告类型：替换交叉 摘要：新兴的大型推理模型（LRMs）在数学和推理任务中持续表现出色，展现了卓越的能力。然而，推理能力的增强以及内部推理过程的暴露引入了新的安全漏洞。一个关键问题出现了：当推理与有害性交织在一起时，LRMs在推理模式下是否会更容易受到越狱攻击？为了研究这一点，我们提出了HauntAttack，一种新颖且通用的黑盒对抗攻击框架，该框架系统地将有害指令嵌入到推理问题中。具体而言，我们通过有害指令修改现有问题中的关键推理条件，从而构建一条引导模型逐步走向不安全输出的推理路径。我们在11个LRMs上评估了HauntAttack，观察到平均攻击成功率超过70%，绝对提升幅度高达13个百分点。
tldr: 提出HauntAttack黑盒攻击框架，通过将有害指令嵌入推理问题的关键条件，引导大型推理模型逐步输出不安全内容，在11个模型上平均攻击成功率超过70%。
en_tdlr: HauntAttack is a novel black-box attack framework that embeds harmful instructions into reasoning questions' key conditions, guiding large reasoning models toward unsafe outputs, achieving over 70% average attack success rate on 11 models.
